output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?player ?jerseyNumber WHERE {
  wd:Q401278 p:P54 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P54 ?player .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?seasonStart .
  FILTER(YEAR(?seasonStart) = 2011)
  .
  ?player p:P54 ?nycStatement .
  ?nycStatement ps:P54 wd:Q317187 .
  ?nycStatement pq:P585 ?nycStart .
  FILTER(YEAR(?nycStart) > 2011)
  .
  ?player wdt:P2096 ?jerseyNumber .
}
output.answer:
The user's question contains a factual error: New York City FC (NYCFC) did not exist in 2011 (it was founded in 2013 and began playing in MLS in 2015). Therefore, no player transferred to NYCFC during the 2011 D.C. United season, as NYCFC was not part of MLS at that time. The SPARQL query correctly returns no results because the data does not exist.

<answer>
New York City FC was not founded until 2013 and did not join Major League Soccer until the 2015 season. Therefore, there is no player who transferred from D.C. United to New York City FC during the 2011 MLS season, as NYCFC did not exist at that time.
</answer>

content.message:
The user's question contains a factual error: New York City FC (NYCFC) did not exist in 2011 (it was founded in 2013 and began playing in MLS in 2015). Therefore, no player transferred to NYCFC during the 2011 D.C. United season, as NYCFC was not part of MLS at that time. The SPARQL query correctly returns no results because the data does not exist.

<answer>
New York City FC was not founded until 2013 and did not join Major League Soccer until the 2015 season. Therefore, there is no player who transferred from D.C. United to New York City FC during the 2011 MLS season, as NYCFC did not exist at that time.
</answer>
